entity.summary: Algorand decentralized exchange application operating under the Humble DeFi and HumbleSwap identity, with dedicated protocol and wallet-connected exchange surfaces.
entity.notes: Current first-party Humble website and HumbleSwap application endpoints are reachable. DefiLlama independently identifies Humble DeFi as an Algorand DEX. Confidence is medium because the current public application is JavaScript-heavy and detailed first-party protocol documentation was not recovered in this review pass.

evidence.title: Humble DeFi official website
evidence.notes: Current first-party Humble website remains reachable and identifies the project as Humble, a DeFi service surface.

evidence.title: HumbleSwap official application
evidence.notes: Current first-party exchange application endpoint is reachable under the HumbleSwap product identity.

evidence.title: Humble DeFi DEX discovery entry
evidence.notes: DEX candidate corpus identifies Humble DeFi as an Algorand decentralized exchange, corroborating the current first-party Humble and HumbleSwap endpoints.
